text:
If a lost train of thought is familiar, this focus pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Write the next physical step in five words or fewer, set a visible timer. And start before your mind finds a better idea. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. A different operating system is not a broken one.
